title: Potato Stuff!
description: A mod that adds a lot potato related stuff!
body:
Things this mod adds:

Block Of Potato - 9 baked potatoes = 1 block of potato
Potatium Ore - A rare ore found in the end, which can be crafted into all the usual tools and armor, and is better than netherite.
Wild Potato - A mob found in the overworld and the new Potato Realm. It drops a wild potato head.
Potato Core - A rare block, crafted with the ender dragon egg surrounded by 4 potatium ingots and 4 blocks of potato
Potato Wither - It can be summoned by placing a block of potato, then a potato core, and then finally a wild potato head
The Potato  - A dimension filled with wild potatoes and potato villagers which hunt the wild potatoes and live in houses.
The Potato Realm Portal Frame - The frame of the portal that leads to the potato dimension, crafted by 1 crying obsidian surrounded by 4 obsidian and 4 potatium ingots. Arrange the portal frames into the shape of a nether portal and light it with a potato realm portal igniter to get to the new dimension
The Potato Realm Portal Igniter - Crafted by 1 block of potato and 1 potatium ingot, used to light the portal to the potato realm
 

There are many more features than what I have listed, but you will have to play it to uncover the secrets! 

 

Happy Playing!

 

If anyone has any requests for versions I should release this mod for, please let me know in the comments, however, this project does not currently work with fabric, so I cannot release it for fabric yet.
